Title: Auth middleware uses deprecated jsonwebtoken API
Description: Claude generated auth code using jwt.verify() with callback pattern instead of the promise-based API. Works but triggers deprecation warnings and will break in jsonwebtoken v10. Need to refactor to async/await pattern.

Title: Duplicated validation logic across 4 route handlers
Description: Each route file has its own copy of input validation logic because they were generated in separate AI sessions. Need to extract into a shared validation middleware with reusable schemas.

Title: Test fixtures use hardcoded dates that will fail in 2027
Description: AI generated test data with dates like '2026-12-31' instead of using relative dates. Tests will start failing when these dates become past dates. Should use date-fns addDays(new Date(), 30) pattern.

Title: WebSocket reconnection has no exponential backoff
Description: Original implementation had a fixed 1-second retry interval. AI fix for the race condition (ses_2e6c4a9f) resolved the bug but didn't add backoff. Under heavy load this will hammer the server.

Title: Database migration scripts not idempotent
Description: First 12 migration scripts lack IF NOT EXISTS checks because they were written before we established that convention. Safe for now but will break if migrations are re-run accidentally.
